sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = sql_add(event_time, interval '30' second) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, sql_add(event_time, interval '10' minute) AS new_event_time FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT sql_add(current_timestamp, interval '1' hour) AS current_plus_one_hour;
